LanguageData.PawnViewDesc: Select apparel worn by the colonist to put on this outfit stand.
LanguageData.OutfitStandViewDesc: Select apparel to wear from this outfit stand; conflicting worn apparel will be moved to the stand.
LanguageData.BOS.HaulToTargetOutfitStand.Desc: Select an outfit stand, haul {THING} to it, and automatically allow this thing def on that stand.
LanguageData.BOS.NoOutfitStand: No colony outfit stand on this map.
LanguageData.BOS.CannotHaulToOutfitStand.Destroyed: The target thing no longer exists.
